title: Whistleblower Dave Grusch Speaks On Being Diagnosed With Autism
summary: David Grusch discusses his autism diagnosis in his early 30s and how it has served as both a help and hindrance in his career and personal life. He explains how his autistic traits like hyper-fixation helped him excel in intelligence work while creating challenges in interpersonal relationships.

key_claims.claim: David Grusch was diagnosed with autism in his early 30s
Autism helped Grusch excel at intelligence work due to hyper-fixation abilities and connecting non-obvious dots
Autism creates challenges in maintaining relationships and reading/expressing emotions
